startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Optional. If empty, actor auto-builds search URLs from Job titles + Country.

jobTitles.title: Job titles
jobTitles.description: Job titles to search for when Start URLs is empty

country.title: Country
country.description: Country keyword used for search URL generation

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Fallback keyword value for output if not set per request

maxItems.title: Max items
maxItems.description: Maximum rows to output. Use 0 for unlimited.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify proxy for better reliability
